title: calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. dariensis
intro: Calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. dariensis is a plant species that belongs to the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. dariensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
